about.tagline: Free and open source accordion tuning program.

help.intro: SmeggTuner listens to an accordion through the microphone and measures each reed against a reference pitch. Readings are filed into a session for one accordion, and that session's goal curve is what every reed is judged against.

rooms.title: The three rooms
rooms.tune: the microphone is open and the needle moves. Play a note to read its reeds and the beats between them.
rooms.workshop: sessions, accordions and printed cards. Open or create a session here.
rooms.settings: the input device, the reading, the naming and the look of the app.

shortcuts.title: Playback keys (with a file open)
shortcuts.homeEnd: Jump to the start or end of the selection
shortcuts.mute: Mute the speakers - the reading keeps moving
shortcuts.fit: Fit the whole file, or fit the selection

everywhere.title: Everywhere
everywhere.manual: Let the tuner pick the note, or pin the one it is on
everywhere.step: Step the pinned note down or up
everywhere.hold: Hold the reading where it is
everywhere.record: Start or stop recording into the open session
everywhere.undo: Throw away the reading captured last
